description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs: lint and build. The lint job should run in a matrix with different linters (checkdoc and mypy) on an ubuntu-latest environment using a docker image, and the build job should run in a matrix with different Python versions (py35, py36, py37, py38) with and without uvloop, also using a docker image and connecting to a RabbitMQ service.
